query:
WITH input(tag) AS (
              SELECT DISTINCT trim(t) FROM UNNEST($1::text[]) AS t WHERE trim(t) != ''
            ),
            ins AS (
              INSERT INTO tags(name)
              SELECT tag FROM input
              ON CONFLICT (name) DO NOTHING
              RETURNING id
            )
            SELECT id FROM ins
            UNION ALL
            SELECT t.id
            FROM tags t
            JOIN input i ON t.name = i.tag
